title: Create: Nimbus
body:
Make a report [here](https://create-nimbus.notion.site/355fdfa8360d80498cccf07d0903b4e4?pvs=105).

# Create aeronautics galore! 


```
This is still WIP.
Don't expect a flawless experience for the moment and report anything wrong.
```
---
# Modpack settings
READ ME!
## Custom memory allocation
```
At least: 8192
Change it based on YOUR own specs.
```
## Custom java arguments
```
-XX:+UseZGC -XX:+ZGenerational -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -XX:+DisableExplicitGC
```
## Making a new world
When making a new world, I highly recommend to type these:
```
/chunky center
/chunky radius 2000 2000 (or more)
/chunky start
```
